justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then offered the same two previously identified slots without attempting to find other alternatives or proactively suggest different times or days.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly offered the same two unavailable slots after each new user request, leading to a highly inefficient and repetitive conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated offering of the same two unavailable slots made the conversation frustrating and unproductive, giving the impression that the agent was stuck in a loop.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to offer new alternatives beyond the initial two available slots, despite numerous attempts by the user to find a suitable time, led to a very poor customer experience and an inefficient conversation.
